# PulseCalendar

> PulseCalendar is a smart calendar app for iPhone, iPad, Mac and Apple Watch made by PULSE (France). It reads existing iCloud, Google, Outlook, Exchange and CalDAV calendars and adds an on-device planning coach (Pulse Brain), an energy score, ADHD-friendly focus modes, school holidays for 20 countries with a public-holiday Bridge Planner, weather from Apple Weather, and dozens of themes. Free plan available; Pulse Pro costs 4.99 EUR/month or 29.99 EUR/year with a 7-day free trial, plus a one-time lifetime license. Available in 175 countries, interface localized in 16 languages. App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/pulsecalendar/id6764295184

Key facts:
- Platforms: iPhone (iOS 16+), iPad, Mac, Apple Watch. Widgets, lock screen widgets and Live Activities on iOS.
- Works on top of existing calendar accounts: iCloud, Google Calendar, Outlook, Exchange, CalDAV. Nothing to migrate.
- Privacy: local storage by default, the assistant (Pulse Brain / Ask Pulse) runs on-device, no ads, no ad tracking, no training on user data. Optional sharing and booking features use a secure Firebase backend.
- ADHD support: a "My Day" view built around 3 daily priorities, Eat the Frog mode, a 5-minute starter mode, staged reminders, and a Recovery Mode that pares a low-score day down to a few light tasks.
- Planning: energy score, week Rhythm view, automatic buffer time, focus blocks, natural language event creation ("find me 2h for the gym this week").
- Time off: school holidays auto-loaded for 20 countries (including France with zones A, B, C); Bridge Planner finds the best public-holiday bridges.
- Extras: weather powered by Apple Weather, dozens of themes, Pulse Booking for sharing availabilities.

Site pages are written in French.

## App

- [PulseCalendar on the App Store](https://apps.apple.com/app/pulsecalendar/id6764295184): download page, current pricing per country
- [Homepage](https://pulsecalendar.app/): overview, themes, pricing and FAQ
- [Features hub](https://pulsecalendar.app/features): all feature pages

## Features

- [Smart calendar](https://pulsecalendar.app/features/smart-calendar): the smart calendar app for iPhone, energy score and week rhythm
- [Intelligent coach](https://pulsecalendar.app/features/ai-calendar): Pulse Brain, the on-device planning coach
- [Anti-procrastination](https://pulsecalendar.app/features/anti-procrastination): Eat the Frog, 5-minute mode, automatic time-blocking
- [Focus planner](https://pulsecalendar.app/features/focus-planner): focus blocks and distraction-free mode
- [ADHD calendar](https://pulsecalendar.app/features/adhd-calendar): externalization, zero friction, immediate feedback, no guilt
- [Schedule optimizer](https://pulsecalendar.app/features/schedule-optimizer): balance focus, recovery and meetings; Bridge Planner for days off

## Comparisons

- [PulseCalendar vs Fantastical](https://pulsecalendar.app/compare/fantastical): pricing, platforms and feature comparison
- [PulseCalendar vs Google Calendar](https://pulsecalendar.app/compare/google-calendar): using PulseCalendar as the iPhone and Mac app on top of a Google account
